meaning: adj.没头脑的,不用脑子的,愚笨无知的,粗心大意的
examples: Just as it's challenging to smoke while knitting, when hands are holding needles and hooks, there's less snacking and mindless eating out of boredom.
We explored the whole town, mindless of the cold and rain.
The film was damned by the critics for its mindless violence.
Make no mistake, much of what we both did was grunt work: boring, mindless, repetitious.
This exercise in mindless cutting is, more than anything, a plea for a serious budget process.
